// BenchmarkRunner.cs
public sealed class BenchmarkRunner : IDisposable
{
    private readonly SemaphoreSlim _mutex = new(1, 1);
    private readonly Dictionary<string, BenchmarkContext> _queue = new();
    private readonly ConcurrentDictionary<string, Task> _running = new();
    private readonly ILogger<BenchmarkRunner> _logger;
    private bool _disposed;

    public BenchmarkRunner(ILogger<BenchmarkRunner> logger) => _logger = logger;

    public void Enqueue(BenchmarkContext ctx)
    {
        if (_disposed) throw new ObjectDisposedException(nameof(BenchmarkRunner));
        _queue[ctx.Model] = ctx;
        _ = ProcessQueueAsync();
    }

    private async Task ProcessQueueAsync()
    {
        while (_queue.Count > 0)
        {
            await _mutex.WaitAsync();
            if (_queue.Count == 0) { _mutex.Release(); return; }

            var kvp = _queue.First();
            _queue.Remove(kvp.Key);
            _mutex.Release();

            var task = RunModelAsync(kvp.Value);
            _running[kvp.Key] = task;

            try { await task; }
            catch (Exception ex) { _logger.LogError(ex, "Benchmark failed for {Model}", kvp.Key); }
            finally { _running.TryRemove(kvp.Key, out _); }
        }
    }
